email_body:
Beste mevrouw/meneer,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Digital Marketing & Communications Officer bij de Marie Curie Alumni Association. Uw missie om onderzoekers te verbinden en te ondersteunen spreekt mij aan, en ik geloof dat mijn ervaring in digitale marketing en contentbeheer goed aansluit bij deze rol.

Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogcontent en beheer ik WordPress-websites. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data, entity-optimalisatie en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) – vaardigheden die steeds belangrijker worden in AI-gestuurde zoekmachines. Ook heb ik sociale media geïntegreerd en prestatierapportages opgesteld met tools zoals Google Analytics en SEMrush.

Ik werk in het Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 – ik volg momenteel lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel inzetbaar.

Ik voeg mijn motivatiebrief en CV bij. Ik hoop u in een gesprek meer te kunnen vertellen over hoe ik kan bijdragen aan de communicatiedoelen van MCAA.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Madam/Sir,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Digital Marketing & Communications Officer position at the Marie Curie Alumni Association. Your mission to connect and support researchers resonates with me, and I believe my experience in digital marketing and content management aligns well with this role.

At Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and manage WordPress websites. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I gained experience in structured data, entity optimization, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) – skills that are increasingly important in AI-driven search. I have also integrated social media and prepared performance reports using tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush.

I work in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 – I am currently taking classes to improve further. I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible.

I attach my cover letter and CV. I hope to tell you more in an interview about how I can contribute to MCAA's communication goals.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste selectiecommissie,

Toen ik de vacature voor Digital Marketing & Communications Officer bij de Marie Curie Alumni Association zag, voelde ik meteen een klik. Uw organisatie verbindt onderzoekers wereldwijd en helpt hen hun carrière te ontwikkelen – een missie die ik graag wil ondersteunen met mijn digitale marketingvaardigheden.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van blogcontent en het beheren van WordPress-websites. Ik werk met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om prestaties te meten en te verbeteren. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema), entity-optimalisatie en GEO – technieken die de vindbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines verbeteren. Ook heb ik sociale media (Instagram/Facebook) geïntegreerd en contentkalenders beheerd.

Wat mij aanspreekt in deze functie is de combinatie van contentcreatie, sociale media en community-engagement. Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig te werken en snel nieuwe tools eigen te maken. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling helpt mij om effectief samen te werken met developers en de technische aspecten van SEO en websitebeheer te begrijpen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 – ik volg actief lessen om mijn taalvaardigheid te verbeteren. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben fulltime beschikbaar.

Ik zou graag mijn motivatie en ideeën met u bespreken in een persoonlijk gesprek. Bedankt voor uw overweging.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Selection Committee,

When I saw the vacancy for Digital Marketing & Communications Officer at the Marie Curie Alumni Association, I felt an immediate connection. Your organization connects researchers worldwide and helps them develop their careers – a mission I would love to support with my digital marketing skills.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing blog content, and managing WordPress websites. I work with tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to measure and improve performance. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I gained experience in structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and GEO – techniques that improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I have also integrated social media (Instagram/Facebook) and managed content calendars.

What appeals to me in this role is the combination of content creation, social media, and community engagement. I am used to working independently and quickly learning new tools. My technical background in web development helps me collaborate effectively with developers and understand the technical aspects of SEO and website management.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 – I am actively taking lessons to improve my language skills. I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am available full-time.

I would be happy to discuss my motivation and ideas with you in a personal conversation. Thank you for your consideration.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- On-page SEO, keyword research, and content writing for client websites at Episto
- Built and managed WordPress sites with Elementor, including content updates and social media integration
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD) and GEO techniques on mirook.com to improve AI search visibility
- Proficient in analytics tools: Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs
- B1 Dutch with active language classes; fluent English and Turkish
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
